# Desa

All Scene count: 1
TWOLD Scene count: 0
Scenes: Nivana frees Desa (../../Scenes/Nivana%20frees%20Desa%20a8cbab268093498db959e34828eccd5c.md)
Personality: ENTP
Character Attributes: Elemental character (../Character%20Attributes/Elemental%20character%201a758e628ba2806bba7ec053001f2dd0.md)
Products: TWOLD (../Products/TWOLD%20e028aa0786f5449984a4f497c1d746fa.md)

A magic user inspired by Gandalf and the black mage from Final Fantasy I.

A character from the books I wrote during my childhood and teens: “Legacies Realm”, “Heroes Realm”, and “Oak”.

In earlier literature he was one of the heroes, but now he seems better as a more neutral party.  He is not evil, but he is also a maverick that has his own agenda.
